The repo’s full queue validator is currently blocked by a different missing wave-5 result file, so it can’t validate just this batch end-to-end. I’m doing a targeted required-field check on the single result file instead.

Wrote [image-description-agent-2-wave-4.json](/Users/microwavedev/workspace/microwave-hub/artist-helper/data/content/analysis/image-descriptions/2026-03-subagent-results/image-description-agent-2-wave-4.json) with 5 described items.
